questions.q: Which number President of India was Pranab Mukherjee?
questions.explanation: Pranab Mukherjee was the thirteenth President of India.

questions.q: In which year did Pranab Mukherjee become President of India?
questions.explanation: He assumed the office of President in 2012.

questions.q: In which year did Pranab Mukherjee's presidential term end?
questions.explanation: His term as President ended in 2017.

questions.q: Which senior cabinet portfolio did Pranab Mukherjee hold before becoming President?
questions.explanation: He served as Finance Minister, among other senior cabinet posts, before becoming President.

questions.q: Pranab Mukherjee held which constitutional office from 2012 to 2017?
questions.explanation: He served as President of India during this period.

questions.q: Which of these external-relations portfolios did Pranab Mukherjee also hold in the cabinet?
questions.explanation: He served as External Affairs Minister during his cabinet career.

questions.q: Pranab Mukherjee was the head of state of which country?
questions.explanation: As President of India, he was the head of state of India.

questions.q: Whom did Pranab Mukherjee succeed as President of India in 2012?
questions.explanation: He succeeded Pratibha Patil, the twelfth President, in 2012.

questions.q: What is the normal term length of the office of President that Pranab Mukherjee held?
questions.explanation: The President of India serves a term of five years.

questions.q: Pranab Mukherjee occupied which official residence as President?
questions.explanation: Rashtrapati Bhavan is the official residence of the President of India.

questions.q: Before his presidency, Pranab Mukherjee was a long-serving member of which kind of legislative body?
questions.explanation: He had a long parliamentary career before becoming President.

questions.q: Which of these descriptions best fits Pranab Mukherjee's career before the presidency?
questions.explanation: He held several senior cabinet positions before being elected President.

questions.q: Who succeeded Pranab Mukherjee as President of India in 2017?
questions.explanation: Ram Nath Kovind, the fourteenth President, succeeded him in 2017.

questions.q: As President, Pranab Mukherjee was the supreme commander of which institution?
questions.explanation: The President of India is the supreme commander of the armed forces.

questions.q: Pranab Mukherjee was elected President through which mechanism?
questions.explanation: The President is elected by an electoral college of MPs and state legislators.

questions.q: Which two senior portfolios are specifically noted among Pranab Mukherjee's cabinet roles?
questions.explanation: He held the Finance Minister and External Affairs Minister portfolios among others.

questions.q: Pranab Mukherjee's presidential tenure spanned which years?
questions.explanation: He served as President from 2012 to 2017.

questions.q: Under the Constitution, the President whom Pranab Mukherjee served as is part of which institution?
questions.explanation: Parliament consists of the President and the two Houses, so the President is part of Parliament.

questions.q: Pranab Mukherjee succeeded the first woman President of India. Who was she?
questions.explanation: He succeeded Pratibha Patil, India's first woman President.

questions.q: Which power over Bills passed by Parliament does the President, the office Mukherjee held, exercise?
options: Voting on Bills in the House
questions.explanation: The President gives assent to Bills or may return certain Bills for reconsideration.

questions.q: Pranab Mukherjee was the thirteenth President; this office is also described as which title for the nation?
questions.explanation: The President is regarded as the first citizen and constitutional head of state of India.

questions.q: As Finance Minister, the portfolio Pranab Mukherjee held, an officeholder is principally responsible for presenting what to Parliament?
questions.explanation: The Finance Minister presents the Union Budget to Parliament each year.

questions.q: Which constitutional article lays down the qualifications for election as President, the office Pranab Mukherjee held?
questions.explanation: Article 58 sets out the qualifications for election as President of India.

questions.q: As President, under which article could Pranab Mukherjee grant pardons?
questions.explanation: Article 72 vests the power to grant pardons and reprieves in the President.

questions.q: Pranab Mukherjee's election as President used which voting method?
options: Proportional representation by single transferable vote
questions.explanation: The President is elected by proportional representation through a single transferable vote in the electoral college.

questions.q: In the sequence of Presidents, the thirteenth President Pranab Mukherjee was preceded by which numbered President?
questions.explanation: He was the thirteenth President, preceded by the twelfth President, Pratibha Patil.

questions.q: The presidential office held by Pranab Mukherjee derives its executive authority under which Part of the Constitution dealing with the Union?
questions.explanation: Part V of the Constitution deals with the Union, including the President and the Union executive.

questions.q: Pranab Mukherjee, as External Affairs Minister, headed which Union ministry?
questions.explanation: The External Affairs Minister heads the Ministry of External Affairs.

questions.q: The oath of office for the President, taken by Pranab Mukherjee in 2012, is administered by which authority under the Constitution?
options: The Speaker of the Lok Sabha
questions.explanation: Under Article 60, the President takes the oath before the Chief Justice of India.

questions.q: The President serves until a successor takes office, the safeguard that applied when Pranab Mukherjee's term ended, under which article?
questions.explanation: Under Article 56, the President holds office until the successor enters upon the office, ensuring continuity.
